subject: Why hasn't my goal been rewarded?
body: Hi, I completed the goal for the banking app 3 days ago (reached the required level) but I still haven't received my coins. The goal page said it would credit. My customer number is C-552 and my email is player552@mail.com. Can you check?

subject: Goal not credited
body: I finished the offer exactly as described and nothing was credited. This is unfair, I did everything right. Customer number C-118.

subject: Didn't get my reward for the game
body: I installed the game and played but my goal didn't track. Customer no. C-274. What went wrong?

subject: Payout taking forever
body: I requested a payout 4 days ago to my PayPal and it still hasn't arrived. What's happening? Customer number C-661, email c661@mail.com.

subject: How long do payouts usually take?
body: Just a general question, how long does it normally take to receive a payout after requesting it? Customer C-789.

subject: STILL waiting for my money
body: This is the third time I'm writing. I requested my payout almost a week ago and nothing. Either send my money or I'm reporting you. Customer number C-205.

subject: My account was deactivated - please help
body: I tried to log in today and my account is deactivated. I don't understand why. Can you tell me what happened and reactivate it? Customer number C-410, email c410@mail.com.

subject: Account deactivated but I am NOT a fraudster
body: My account got deactivated and I have done nothing wrong. I am a real user and I have not cheated. This is completely unfair, I want my account back immediately. Customer no. C-846.

subject: Can't log in after password reset
body: I reset my password and now it keeps saying invalid credentials. Customer C-337. Please help, I'm locked out.

subject: thanks!
body: just wanted to say the new payout speed is great, got my money fast this time. keep it up!

subject: How does goal tracking work?
body: I'm new here. What do I need to do so my goals actually track and get rewarded? I don't want to miss out. Customer C-159.

subject: GDPR data deletion request
body: Under GDPR I am requesting that you delete all personal data you hold about me and confirm in writing once done. Customer number C-901.
